tools.name: get_trade_call
tools.description: Returns a composite BUY/SELL/HOLD trade call for a perpetual on Binance / Hyperliquid / Bybit / OKX / Bitget. Combines RSI(14), EMA(9/21) crossover, funding rate, OI momentum, and volume into a weighted score with confidence percentage.

timeframe.description: Candle timeframe. 1m/3m for HFT scalping, 5m/15m for intraday agents (most popular), 30m/1h/2h for swing, 4h/8h/12h/1d for position trading. Free tier: all 11 timeframes available, 100 calls/month.

exchange.description: Exchange to analyze. 'BINANCE' = Binance USDT-M Futures (default), 'HL' = Hyperliquid, 'BYBIT' = Bybit Linear, 'OKX' = OKX Swap, 'BITGET' = Bitget USDT-M, 'ASTER' = Aster BNB-Chain perp DEX (shadow — experimental), 'EDGEX' = edgeX L2 zk-rollup perp DEX (shadow — experimental). Shadow venues (experimental, not yet on public dashboard) require explicit exchange param; query the mcp://algovault/venues resource for the live per-venue status table. Asset availability varies per venue — pass exchange explicitly to target a specific venue.

tools.name: get_trade_signal
tools.description: Returns a composite BUY/SELL/HOLD trade call for a perpetual on Binance / Hyperliquid / Bybit / OKX / Bitget. Combines RSI(14), EMA(9/21) crossover, funding rate, OI momentum, and volume into a weighted score with confidence percentage. (Alias for `get_trade_call` since v1.10.0; identical behavior. New agents should call `get_trade_call`.)

timeframe.description: Candle timeframe. 1m/3m for HFT scalping, 5m/15m for intraday agents (most popular), 30m/1h/2h for swing, 4h/8h/12h/1d for position trading. Free tier: all 11 timeframes available, 100 calls/month.

exchange.description: Exchange to analyze. 'BINANCE' = Binance USDT-M Futures (default), 'HL' = Hyperliquid, 'BYBIT' = Bybit Linear, 'OKX' = OKX Swap, 'BITGET' = Bitget USDT-M, 'ASTER' = Aster BNB-Chain perp DEX (shadow — experimental), 'EDGEX' = edgeX L2 zk-rollup perp DEX (shadow — experimental). Shadow venues (experimental, not yet on public dashboard) require explicit exchange param; query the mcp://algovault/venues resource for the live per-venue status table. Asset availability varies per venue — pass exchange explicitly to target a specific venue.

tools.name: scan_funding_arb
tools.description: Scans cross-venue funding rate differences between Hyperliquid, Binance, and Bybit. Returns top arbitrage opportunities ranked by annualized spread.

minSpreadBps.description: Minimum spread in basis points to include (0-10000)

tools.name: get_market_regime
tools.description: Classifies the current market regime (TRENDING_UP, TRENDING_DOWN, RANGING, VOLATILE) for a Hyperliquid perp using ADX(14), volatility ratio, price structure, and cross-venue funding sentiment.

exchange.description: Exchange to analyze. 'HL' = Hyperliquid (default), 'BINANCE' = Binance USDT-M Futures, 'BYBIT' = Bybit Linear, 'OKX' = OKX Swap, 'BITGET' = Bitget USDT-M, 'ASTER' = Aster BNB-Chain perp DEX (shadow — experimental), 'EDGEX' = edgeX L2 zk-rollup perp DEX (shadow — experimental). Shadow venues (experimental, not yet on public dashboard) require explicit exchange param; query the mcp://algovault/venues resource for the live per-venue status table.
